FGO_POWER_QUICK_CARD_POWER.smartDescript: Whenever you play a Power card, gain %d Star.
FGO_POWER_FOUL_WEATHER_POWER.title: Foul Weather
FGO_POWER_TAINTED_CURSE_POWER.title: Tainted Curse
FGO_POWER_TAINTED_CURSE_POWER.descriptio: Reduce 50% damage taken. Whenever it is attacked, apply 1 Evil Curse to you.
FGO_POWER_TAINTED_CURSE_POWER.smartDescr: Reduce 50% damage taken. Whenever it is attacked, apply 1 Evil Curse to you.
FGO_POWER_POWEROF_GRUDGE_POWER.title: Power of Grudge
FGO_POWER_POWEROF_GRUDGE_POWER.descripti: This enemy's attack damage and the damage it takes both increase by 1 for each Evil Curse.
FGO_POWER_POWEROF_GRUDGE_POWER.smartDesc: This enemy's attack damage and the damage it takes both increase by 1 for each Evil Curse.
FGO_POWER_CURSE_CONDENSING_POWER.title: Curse Condensing
FGO_POWER_CURSE_CONDENSING_POWER.descrip: After the enemy's next action conclude, you will absorb all Evil Curses.
FGO_POWER_CURSE_CONDENSING_POWER.smartDe: After the enemy's next action conclude, you will absorb all Evil Curses. After the enemy's next %d actions concludes, you will absorb all Evil Curses.
FGO_POWER_FAERIE_KNIGHT_POWER.title: Faerie Knight
FGO_POWER_FAERIE_KNIGHT_POWER.descriptio: Your next Camelot gain additional buffs: gain 5 Artifact.
FGO_POWER_FAERIE_KNIGHT_POWER.smartDescr: Your next Camelot gain additional buffs: gain 5 Artifact.
FGO_POWER_COOLDOWN_FGO_POWER.title: Cooldown
FGO_POWER_COOLDOWN_FGO_POWER.description: Has no effect but to reduce 1 turn.
FGO_POWER_COOLDOWN_FGO_POWER.smartDescri: %s has no effect but to reduce 1 turn, exist %d turns.
FGO_POWER_FAE_QUEEN_POWER.title: Fae Queen
FGO_POWER_FAE_QUEEN_POWER.description:
1.At the end of her turn, remove 1 debuff. 
 2.Activate Charisma of Desire once every 3 turns, she gain 2 Strength and you gain 1 Vulnerable.
FGO_POWER_FAE_QUEEN_POWER.smartDescripti:
1.At the end of her turn, remove 1 debuff. 
 2.Activate Charisma of Desire once every 3 turns, she gain 2 Strength and you gain 1 Vulnerable. It is currently the %dth turn. At the end of this turn, Activate Charisma of Desire.
FGO_POWER_ORKNEY_POWER.title: O bell of Orkney!
FGO_POWER_ORKNEY_POWER.description: At the end of her turns, you gain 1 Weak, add 2 *Dazed into your discard pile.
FGO_POWER_ORKNEY_POWER.smartDescription: At the end of her for %d turns, you gain 1 Weak, add 2 *Dazed into your discard pile.
FGO_POWER_NOW_STORM_POWER.title: Now this is a storm.
FGO_POWER_NOW_STORM_POWER.description:
1.At the end of her turn, she gain 1 Strength and Thorns. 
 2.Each of her attack intentions will remove one of your buffs.
FGO_POWER_NOW_STORM_POWER.smartDescripti:
1.At the end of her turn, she gain 1 Strength and Thorns. 
 2.Each of her attack intentions will remove one of your buffs.
FGO_POWER_PROPHESIZED_CHILD_POWER.title: Prophesized Child
FGO_POWER_PROPHESIZED_CHILD_POWER.descri: Activate Charisma of Hope once every 3 turns, you gain 2 Strength and 30% NP.
FGO_POWER_PROPHESIZED_CHILD_POWER.smartD: Activate Charisma of Hope once every 3 turns, you gain 2 Strength and 30% NP. It is currently the %dth turn. At the end of this turn, Activate Charisma rof Hope.
FGO_POWER_CURSE_DECAYED_FLESH_POWER.desc: Cernunnos reduces attack damage it takes by 10% and increases its attack damage by 10% for each stack of Evil Curses it has.
FGO_POWER_CURSE_DECAYED_FLESH_POWER.smar:
Cernunnos reduces attack damage it takes by 10% and increases its attack damage by 10% for each stack of Evil Curses it has.  
 Whenever Cernunnos is attacked, if it has Evil Curses, it removes 1 Evil Curses, heals 10 HP, and you gain 1 Vulnerable and Evil Curses.
FGO_POWER_GAINS_CURSE_LAYER_POWER.title: Gains Curse Layer
FGO_POWER_GAINS_CURSE_LAYER_POWER.descri:
At the end of each turn, Cernunnos gain 3 Evil Curses. 
 Whenever Cernunnos attack, gain 1 Evil Curses.
FGO_POWER_GAINS_CURSE_LAYER_POWER.smartD:
At the end of each turn, Cernunnos gain 3 Evil Curses. 
 Whenever Cernunnos attack, gain 1 Evil Curses.

FGO_POWER_NP_PER_TURN_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, gain NP.
FGO_POWER_NP_PER_TURN_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of each turn, gain %d%% NP.
FGO_POWER_LUCKY_SPINNING_POWER.title: Lucky Spinning
FGO_POWER_LUCKY_SPINNING_POWER.descripti: Whenever you deal damage this turn, gain Stars.
FGO_POWER_LUCKY_SPINNING_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever you deal damage this turn, gain {0} Stars.
FGO_POWER_DEPARTURE_OF_THE_SUN_POWER.des: For every Stars you have, NP damage increases by 30%.
FGO_POWER_DEPARTURE_OF_THE_SUN_POWER.sma: For every %d Stars you have, NP damage increases by 30%.

FGO_POWER_ANTI_BEAST_MAGECRAFT_POWER.sma: Whenever you gain a Power, gain %d Block.
FGO_POWER_IMAGINARY_SPACE_POWER.title: Imaginary Space
FGO_POWER_IMAGINARY_SPACE_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, gain Energy. If you have Waterside, draw a card.
FGO_POWER_IMAGINARY_SPACE_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Energy. If you have Waterside, draw 1 card.
